notes: The maze layout is malformed with mismatched row widths and ghost-house logic issues causing ghosts to behave erratically, pac-man movement snapping is unreliable, and the collision/wall detection has edge cases that make the game feel broken despite controls being mapped correctly.

This is a recognizable and mostly working Pac-Man clone, but the maze/layout is inaccurate, collision and movement logic are simplified/imprecise, and ghost behavior plus overall game feel fall short of a solid benchmark-quality build.
